title: vulkan-pvp-pack
description: Its an PvP modpack with vulkan
body:
# Vulkan PvP Modpack

This is a Vulkan-based Minecraft modpack designed for PvP. I often had the problem that my FPS dropped while playing PvP, but Vulkan solved that issue and significantly improved my performance.

I also added several PvP-focused mods, all of which are fully compatible with Vulkan. Additionally, you can choose whether you want to use PvPTiers Tagger or the Tier Tagger from MCTiers, depending on your preference.

### Requirements

- A device (GPU) that supports Vulkan 1.2 or higher

### My PC Specs

- Intel Core i7-10700F
- 32 GB RAM
- NVIDIA RTX 3070

With this setup, I managed to reach over 1000 FPS.![1000fps ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6174ab09eaf5a4c09c1bcd213f8351c2af13e75.png)

Yes, I know I was looking at the sky, but it’s still pretty impressive.
I hope you enjoy the modpack and that it helps you win your next Minecraft PvP match!




Here is some clean gameplay
